title: galeopsis pyrenaica
intro: Galeopsis pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean hemp-nettle or Pyrenean gallium, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galeopsis pyrenaica include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis pyrenaica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
